growth.name: EdgeOne
growth.sub: One-step futures eval • 5 sizes ($50K–$200K) • end-of-day trailing drawdown • no daily loss limit • 40% max-daily-profit consistency on funded payouts
growth.about: EdgeOne is EdgeProp's end-of-day-trailing one-step evaluation. The drawdown is measured on closing balances rather than intraday highs, which suits controlled, swing-style traders who don't want an open-trade high pulling their threshold up against them. Pass the single profit target over a minimum of 7 trading days, then trade a simulated funded account on Rithmic live data with a 100% split up to $5,000 (then 90/10) and weekly withdrawals. Funded payouts require 5 profitable days of at least $200 each and must satisfy a 40% max-daily-profit consistency rule at the time of request. A one-time $120 activation fee applies on the funded account.
features: Free platform licenses (Bookmap, ATAS, NinjaTrader, Quantower +more)
Five sizes up to $200K · up to 5 funded accounts
bestFor: Swing/position futures traders who want EOD drawdown
Traders comfortable balancing daily profits for the 40% rule
notIdeal: Traders who want zero consistency rule (see EdgeX)
Traders in one of the ~85 restricted countries
growth.ctaText: Pass the one-step EdgeOne evaluation to reach a funded EdgeProp account — 100% of profits up to $5,000, then 90/10, with weekly withdrawals. A one-time $120 activation fee applies on the funded account.

select.name: EdgeCore
select.sub: One-step futures eval • 5 sizes ($50K–$200K) • real-time intraday trailing drawdown • no daily loss limit • 40% max-daily-profit consistency on funded payouts
select.about: EdgeCore is EdgeProp's real-time intraday-trailing one-step evaluation, built for scalpers and active intraday traders. The drawdown tightens in real time as your balance rises, so open-trade highs pull your threshold up against you — the trade-off for trading the same one-step structure as EdgeOne. Pass the single profit target over a minimum of 7 trading days, then trade a simulated funded account on Rithmic live data with a 100% split up to $5,000 (then 90/10) and weekly withdrawals. Funded payouts require 5 profitable days of at least $200 each and a 40% max-daily-profit consistency rule at the time of request. A one-time $120 activation fee applies on the funded account.
features: Free platform licenses (Bookmap, ATAS, NinjaTrader, Quantower +more)
Five sizes up to $200K · up to 5 funded accounts
bestFor: Scalpers and active intraday futures traders
Traders who can manage a real-time trailing threshold
notIdeal: Traders who cannot manage an intraday trailing drawdown
Traders who want zero consistency rule (see EdgeX)
select.ctaText: Pass the one-step EdgeCore evaluation to reach a funded EdgeProp account — 100% of profits up to $5,000, then 90/10, with weekly withdrawals. A one-time $120 activation fee applies on the funded account.

lightning.name: EdgeX
lightning.sub: One-step futures eval • 5 sizes ($50K–$200K) • end-of-day trailing drawdown • no daily loss limit • no consistency rule (only 5 profitable days for payout)
lightning.about: EdgeX is EdgeProp's most permissive one-step evaluation: end-of-day trailing drawdown and no consistency rule at all. Funded payouts only require 5 profitable days of at least $200 each — there is no 40% max-daily-profit cap, so a single strong day won't hold up your withdrawal. Pass the single profit target over a minimum of 7 trading days, then trade a simulated funded account on Rithmic live data with a 100% split up to $5,000 (then 90/10) and weekly withdrawals. A one-time $120 activation fee applies on the funded account.
features: Free platform licenses · five sizes up to $200K
bestFor: Traders who want no consistency rule of any kind
Traders who prefer EOD trailing and simple payout rules
notIdeal: Traders who want real-time intraday drawdown (see EdgeCore)
Traders in one of the ~85 restricted countries
lightning.ctaText: Pass the one-step EdgeX evaluation to reach a funded EdgeProp account — 100% of profits up to $5,000, then 90/10, with weekly withdrawals and no consistency rule. A one-time $120 activation fee applies on the funded account.

tab_content.rules: EdgeProp runs three one-step evaluation programs that share the same price, profit targets, contracts and 7-trading-day minimum, and differ only in funded drawdown style and consistency: EdgeOne (end-of-day trailing, 40% max-daily-profit consistency), EdgeCore (real-time intraday trailing, 40% consistency) and EdgeX (end-of-day trailing, no consistency). There is no daily loss limit on any program. Futures only — no forex, CFDs, stocks, options or crypto. High-impact news: flatten at least 5 minutes before and don't trade until 2 minutes after the release (instant fail on eval; audit, suspension or payout denial when funded). Automation is allowed if risk rules are respected, and copy trading between your own accounts is allowed. Funded accounts are simulated on Rithmic live data with a 100% split up to $5,000 (then 90/10), weekly withdrawals and a one-time $120 activation fee. Per-trade risk is capped at 30% of your profit cushion (rising to 50% after the account grows).
tab_content.scaling: Contract scaling is safety-net based: accounts trade half-contract allocation until the balance reaches the Safety Net, then full allocation unlocks. Safety Net = Starting Balance + Trailing Drawdown + $100 — i.e. $52,600 (50K), $78,100 (75K), $103,600 (100K), $154,600 (150K) and $206,100 (200K). For the first five payouts a max of $2,500 per payout applies and the Safety Net must always be respected; from the sixth payout the per-request cap rises to $5,000.

faq.q: What's the difference between EdgeOne, EdgeCore and EdgeX?
faq.a: All three are one-step evaluations with identical pricing, targets and contracts. EdgeOne uses end-of-day trailing drawdown with a 40% max-daily-profit consistency rule; EdgeCore uses real-time intraday trailing drawdown with the same 40% rule; EdgeX uses end-of-day trailing drawdown with no consistency rule (only 5 profitable days are needed for payouts).

You need 5 profitable trading days of at least $200 each since funding or your last payout. The minimum payout is $500. For the first five payouts the cap is $2,500 (50K–75K) or $3,500 (100K–200K) per request; from the sixth payout the cap rises to $5,000. Withdrawals are weekly and the Safety Net must always be respected.

On EdgeOne and EdgeCore, at the time of a payout request your largest single-day net profit must not exceed 40% of your total net profit since funding. It only affects payout eligibility, not your ability to keep trading. EdgeX has no consistency rule.

faq.q: Can I trade the news or use bots?
faq.a: You must flatten at least 5 minutes before a high-impact news release and wait until 2 minutes after to resume. Automation is allowed if risk rules are respected, and copy trading between your own accounts is allowed.
